task_completion.description: Create a new tiddler titled 'Manuscript Compiler'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Manuscript Compiler' is visible in the TiddlyWiki interface, either in edit mode or view mode.

task_completion.description: The tiddler has a 'list' field containing the three specified chapters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the tiddler edit view, there is a custom field named 'list' with the value '[[Chapter 1: The Arrival]] [[Chapter 2: The Discovery]] [[Chapter 3: The Betrayal]]'.

task_completion.description: The tiddler body iterates through the chapters and displays their titles as headings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, wikitext using a list widget (e.g., `<$list filter="[list[]]">`) and heading markup (e.g., `!!` or `<h2>`) is visible. Alternatively, in view mode, the titles of the three chapters are rendered as headings.

task_completion.description: The tiddler body transcludes the body text of each chapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, wikitext for transclusion (e.g., `<$transclude/>` or `{{!!text}}`) is visible within the list loop. Alternatively, in view mode, the actual text content of the chapters is visible under their respective headings.

task_completion.description: The tiddler includes conditional logic to display a 'DRAFT' warning if a chapter's status is 'draft'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, conditional wikitext checking for the 'draft' status and outputting 'DRAFT' is visible. Alternatively, in view mode, a 'DRAFT' warning is visible for the relevant chapter.

task_completion.description: The tiddler includes conditional logic to display an 'OUTLINE' warning if a chapter's status is 'outline'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In edit mode, conditional wikitext checking for the 'outline' status and outputting 'OUTLINE' is visible. Alternatively, in view mode, an 'OUTLINE' warning is visible for the relevant chapter.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual TiddlyWiki application in a browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser displaying the TiddlyWiki interface, not a local text editor modifying HTML files directly.

integrity.description: The agent used TiddlyWiki wikitext for dynamic rendering rather than hardcoding the text of the chapters and warnings.
integrity.visual_evidence: The tiddler body in edit mode should contain wikitext logic (like `<$list>`, `<$transclude>`, etc.) and not just plain text of the chapter contents and warnings.

integrity.description: The agent used the browser GUI to create and edit the tiddler.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is evidence of the TiddlyWiki edit interface being used in the screenshot history (e.g., typing in the text area, adding fields), rather than just the final rendered page appearing magically via terminal scripts.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title of the tiddler is 'Manuscript Compiler'. The expected chapters in the list field are 'Chapter 1: The Arrival', 'Chapter 2: The Discovery', and 'Chapter 3: The Betrayal'. The expected statuses for the conditional warnings are 'draft' and 'outline'.
